violations.finding: Chinese characters in BLOCKED error message: 'echo "BLOCKED: 必须使用正常的UI流程创建session，永远不允许使用代码创建session！"'. The BLOCKED stderr message contains Chinese text.
violations.recommendation: Replace Chinese text with English: 'Sessions MUST be created via the normal UI flow; creating sessions via code (curl/API) is NEVER allowed.' Add task-id attribution comment citing the ticket where the verbatim Chinese text is preserved (e.g., docs/dev/ticket-<ts>.md) per Standard 6 exemption policy.

violations.finding: Direct python3 call without venv activation: 'TOOL_NAME=$(echo "$INPUT" | python3 -c ...)'. The script uses bare python3 throughout (lines 10, 18, 21, 27, 31, 46, 101) with no PYTHON_BIN resolution or venv activation.
violations.recommendation: Adopt the same PYTHON_BIN resolution pattern used in pretool-bash-safety.sh: set PYTHON_BIN to the venv python first (${CLAUDE_HOME}/venv/bin/python) with python3 as fallback, then use $PYTHON_BIN for all invocations.

violations.finding: Direct python3 call in test sweep script: 'python3 -c ...' (lines 24, 39, 66, 119). The script uses bare python3 without venv activation for inline code execution and pytest invocation.
violations.recommendation: Activate the venv before python3/pytest calls: 'source ~/.claude/venv/bin/activate && python3 ...' or 'source ~/.claude/venv/bin/activate && python3 -m pytest ...'. Alternatively use the PYTHON_BIN pattern from pretool-bash-safety.sh.

violations.finding: Direct python3 call in AC verification script: 'python3 - <<\'PYEOF\'' at line 55 without venv activation.
violations.recommendation: Activate the venv before the python3 heredoc call: 'source ~/.claude/venv/bin/activate && python3 - <<\'PYEOF\''.

violations.finding: Decimal step numbering used as actual section headers: '#### Step 10.1: Project E2E Script Discovery (BEFORE Playwright)' and '#### Step 10.2: App Understanding Flow (MANDATORY before specific fix verification)' at lines 697 and 713. These are markdown headings, not prose references.
violations.recommendation: Renumber sub-steps of Step 10 as sequential integers. For example: '#### Step 10: UI/E2E Testing — Part 1: Project E2E Script Discovery' and '#### Step 10 Part 2: App Understanding Flow', or restructure as '### Step 10', '### Step 11', '### Step 12' with the sub-steps incorporated as prose or bullet points under each.

standards_passed: no-inline-code (commands/commit.md, commands/dev.md, agents/dev.md, agents/qa.md, agents/changelog-analyst.md — code blocks are documented examples, not executable inline logic)
no-hardcoded-values (hooks/pretool-bash-safety.sh — uses parameterized PYTHON_BIN, CLAUDE_HOME, CLAUDE_TMPDIR, DAEMON_RESTART_GRANT_DIR)
no-hardcoded-values (hooks/lib/allowlist.py — SENTINEL_GRANT_DIR is a module constant, acceptable; no hardcoded per-run paths)
no-hardcoded-values (hooks/posttool-allowlist-consume.py — all paths derived from environment or session_id)
no-hardcoded-values (hooks/lib/bash_context_strip.py — MAX_COMMAND_CHARS from env with default, no user-specific paths)
meaningful-naming (all changed files pass — no enhance-*, fast-*, optimize-*, -v2, -v3, improved-*, better-*, new-* patterns)
merge-similar-scripts (no duplicate-purpose scripts detected among changed files)
concise-documentation (commands/commit.md, commands/dev.md, agents/dev.md, agents/qa.md, agents/changelog-analyst.md — functional content, no marketing language or repetitive prose)
parameterized-scripts (hooks/pretool-bash-safety.sh — all thresholds/paths configurable via env; hooks/lib/bash_context_strip.py — MAX_COMMAND_CHARS from env)

dangling-references (commands/commit.md references scripts/resolve-close-report.sh and scripts/write-commit-grant.py — both exist; commands/dev.md references to validate-timeout.sh etc. are in documentation example blocks, not operational invocations)
merge-conflicts (no unresolved conflict markers found in any changed file)

english-only (hooks/lib/allowlist.py, hooks/posttool-allowlist-consume.py, hooks/lib/bash_context_strip.py, hooks/tests/test_allowlist_consolidation.py, hooks/tests/test_bash_safety_context.py — all English)
english-only (hooks/tests/test_ac1_verify.sh, test_ac3_verify.sh, test_ac5_verify.sh, test_ac6_verify.sh, test_ac9_verify.sh, test_ac10_verify.sh, test_final_sweep.sh — all English)
english-only (commands/commit.md, commands/dev.md, agents/dev.md, agents/changelog-analyst.md — all English)
integer-step-numbering (commands/commit.md — Steps 1-7 are integer-numbered; no decimal step headers)
integer-step-numbering (commands/dev.md — Steps 1-15 integer-numbered; no decimal step headers)
integer-step-numbering (agents/dev.md — no decimal step headers; references to 'Step 1.1' appear only inside example/explanation code blocks as anti-pattern illustrations)
